mapper.sql: id, ability_name_cn, ability_name_en, ability_desc_cn, ability_desc_en, ability_type, order_num, status, entry_url, hidden, route_path, alias_name, require_release, load_type, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM openplatform_ability_t
AND (ability_name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ability_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 1
ORDER BY ${sortField} ${sortOrder} LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_ability_t
AND (ability_name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ability_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 1

SELECT
FROM openplatform_ability_t WHERE ability_type = #{abilityType} LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(order_num) FROM openplatform_ability_t WHERE status = 1
